mapper.select: SELECT * FROM game WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO game (id, name, type, description, thumbnail_url, config, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{game.id}, #{game.name}, #{game.type}, #{game.description}, #{game.thumbnailUrl}, #{game.config}, #{game.userId}, #{game.createdAt}, #{game.updatedAt})

update.foreach: UPDATE game SET name = #{game.name}, type = #{game.type}, description = #{game.description}, thumbnail_url = #{game.thumbnailUrl}, config = #{game.config}, user_id = #{game.userId}, updated_at = #{game.updatedAt} WHERE id = #{game.id}

mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM game WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalGames, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as totalUsers, COUNT(CASE WHEN type = '2d-strategy' THEN 1 END) as strategy2dCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN type = '2d-metroidvania' THEN 1 END) as metroidvania2dCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN type = '2d-rpg' THEN 1 END) as rpg2dCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN type = '3d-shooter' THEN 1 END) as shooter3dCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN type = '3d-legacy' THEN 1 END) as legacy3dCount, DATE(created_at) as createDate, COUNT(*) as dailyCount FROM game GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY createDate DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM game GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) as gameCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT type) as gameTypes, MAX(created_at) as lastCreated, MIN(created_at) as firstCreated FROM game WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY user_id
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM game WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE game SET config = #{config}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE game SET thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE game SET user_id = #{newUserId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{oldUserId}
